payload.label: stove
payload.long_description: Close-up of a black glossy stovetop/cooktop showing a horizontal row of chrome control knobs and stainless/chrome trim; reflective surface with slight blur and compression artifacts, partially edge-cropped at top and bottom, estimated ~0.6 m from camera.
